title: Rightwell Car Seat Organiser 2 Pcs Back Seat Protector for Kids, Car Organiser Back Seat for up to 10" iPad, Kids Back Seat Organiser with 5 Pockets to Storage Toys, Books, Drinks
features: 🚗【Large Backseat Car Organiser for baby】There are multi-Pocket Storage with this baby car seat organisers, easy handy storage of snack foods, children toys, water bottles, drinks, books, magazines etc. Adjustable top and bottom straps that remain hidden and out of the way so the front seat passenger. A must have for a family with kids.

🚗【Suitable for Most Cars】The measures of this car seat protector is 16" wide x 24" long, which would cover your backseat fully and easily. Suitable for most of cars, vehicles, Jeeps, trucks, vans and SUV. Easy to clean the dirty prints on them, just need a wet cloth to clean it up. Water-resistant, machine-washable fabric for easy care.

🚗【Durable Material】The back seat protectors for kids are strong and environmentally friendly. Premium quality better than others, which is environmentally friendly materials 600D Polyester, perfect protect your seats from scratches, spills, stains, scuff marks, mud, dirt, and getting worn out. Ideal for those with kids and pets as well! Minimize damage from footwear and maintain flawless car upholstery for many years to come.

🚗【Clear IPAD Holder】The ipad car holder back seat for kids can hold up to 10" iPad and tablets. The screen of the tablet is well visible through the window pocket and you can also control the device in the pocket, which is great for kids and back seat passengers entertainment.

🚗【Easy to Install】The car storage organiser with adjustable straps will easily fit to almost any car's back seat. Tips: Hang on the organizer to back seat and buckle up, adjust the length then you can enjoy the storage organizer freely. [Car organizer is machine washable]
description: Product Description Warning: The product is designed for small and light stuff, you had better not put too much heavy things or too many drinks into the mesh bags. Please be kindly aware that the Maximum Load Capacity is: within 10 pounds. Multiple pocket organizers Car Backseat Organizer The car organisers combines the protection of the anti-kick pad with 6 pockets of practical tools, a variety of pockets to meet all your needs. Provide entertainment for children of all sizes and provide a place to store items during long trips. Product Details: Transparent touch screen tablet pocket 4 flexible mesh bottle holders Waterproof Oxford material large capacity pocket Touch screen tablet stand The rear seat organizer with transparent and touchable visual window can accommodate a 10-inch iPad or Android tablet. Your children can watch TV, play games or read e-books, bringing more fun to family travel. Easy to clean This car rear seat organizer is made of high-quality Oxford cloth, which is waterproof and can protect the car seat. With the cleaning cloth, the rear seat organizer looks like new again. Keep the car tidy A variety of pocket designs save space and can store a lot of things to make your car look clean and tidy. It is ideal for long distance trips, family vacations or long car trips. Easy Installation Simply fasten the clips on straps around the top of the seat and around the bottom.The adjustable belt can easily adapt to different vehicle seats. Note： 1:RIGHTWELL Car Backseat Organizer isn't suitable for the uneven back of the front seat. 2:RIGHTWELL Car Backseat Organizer isn't suitable for the front seat which has a handle on it. 3:RIGHTWELL Car Backseat Organizer isn't suitable for the front seat which is integrated with the headrest as it's difficult to fasten it. Premium Quality Material The Car Backseat Organizer is more durable because it is made of high-quality Oxford materials with waterproof property and good durability, and protects the back of your car seat from footprints, stains, scratches,etc. Package Included: 2 Pack Car Backseat Organizer
